song.title: Put on the New Man
song.author: Mark Jordan
song.lyrics:
[v1] With the steady ticking of Life's clock we often lock our gaze Upon the earth beneath our feet And we forget our heavenly place.
Sorrows, fears, anxieties Betray us, weigh us down, they tie us To this old and dying place.
[c1] Set your mind on things above Not on the earth (For you died and) You were raised up with Christ (The Word records it) And your life is hidden with Christ. You were raised up with Christ (You can't ignore it) And your life is hidden with Christ.
[v2] Deep within our body lurks A different law, our sinful members Must obey it, can't betray it When our mind is set on it.
So we fight, like Paul before, A wretched man, a hopeless war, We wish we're righteous but we're not.
[c2] Put to death the practices of The Body now (You can do it) By the Spirit not the flesh (That's how you do it) By the Spirit not the flesh By the Spirit not the flesh (That's how you do it) By the Spirit not the flesh
[v3] Even after we've received The life of God with all its riches Still the old man, full of lies Blasphemes the stars, the earth, the skies
Lord, reveal that there's no other Way than just to put this man To death, to put off this old man.
[c3] And put on the new man who is Simply Christ (And in this man) There is neither Greek nor Jew (In this new man is) Just the Christ who's deep in you. There is neither slave nor free (We share this new man) Just the Christ in you and me.
